name: distortionz_hijack
changelog: v1.1.5 — Added README.md with overview, features, dependencies, installation, and credits. Standardized GitHub repo metadata (badges, dynamic version pull, MIT license, Qbox required). v1.1.4 — Target vehicles no longer spawn locked. Pre-sets the doorslockstate statebag to 1 (unlocked) on spawn so qbx_vehiclekeys' enter-attempt handler skips its spawnLockedIfParked roll. v1.1.3 — Contact ped is now flagged as protected. v1.1.2 — Drop-off location overhaul.
